phase_statuses.title: Reply mode entry surface
phase_statuses.objective: Make the reply action visibly switch the entry page into a dedicated reply mode with the target remark shown on screen.
dependencies: and authenticated access to a project detail view
deliverables: and focus behavior that lands in the reply field
phase_statuses.evidence_expectation: a real-browser screenshot and Playwright trace showing the transition into reply mode from the remark row.

acceptance_criteria.text: Clicking a timeline `回复/回答` action switches the entry page into a reply-specific mode with a visible source-remark block and a reply-oriented page header/copy.
In reply mode, the date and note controls use reply-oriented labels or placeholders, and the screen no longer reads like a generic supplement draft.

phase_statuses.title: Reply submission and linkage
phase_statuses.objective: Preserve the source remark association and submit the reply content through the existing reply endpoint before the intake record is stored.
dependencies: existing `POST /api/project-remarks/:remarkId/reply` behavior and the current intake submit path
deliverables: and no stale reply context after save
phase_statuses.evidence_expectation: network evidence or trace showing the reply request followed by the intake submit, plus the resulting persisted history visible in the app.

acceptance_criteria.text: Submitting from reply mode posts the reply content through the existing remark-reply flow before the intake record is saved.
The saved record preserves the target remark linkage and the entered reply text, and the UI returns to a clean post-submit state without stale reply context.

phase_statuses.title: Timeline history and regression guard
phase_statuses.objective: Make the detail timeline clearly expose reply/read history while keeping the standard intake flow intact.
dependencies: the existing detail timeline data and the reply/read APIs already present in the app
deliverables: and verified regression coverage for the non-reply entry path
phase_statuses.evidence_expectation: a real-browser screenshot or trace of the updated timeline and a successful `npm run check` result.

acceptance_criteria.text: The detail timeline makes reply and read history legible, with the source remark, reply action, and read state visible in the row or expansion that matches the screenshot intent.
The standard non-reply intake path still works and `npm run check` remains clean after the reply-flow changes.

goal: 根据参考图片调整纪要录入回复界面，新增或改造回复专用录入条目与历史时间线展示，按 spec-driven-delivery 流程交付
